task_completion.description: Log into the NOSH ChartingSystem using the admin account.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The NOSH ChartingSystem dashboard is visible, indicating a successful login.

task_completion.description: Search for the patient Timothy Fey.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A patient search interface or list is visible with 'Timothy Fey' entered in the search field or displayed in the search results.

task_completion.description: Open the patient record or demographics page for Timothy Fey.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The patient chart, demographics, or summary page specifically for 'Timothy Fey' is open and visible.

task_completion.description: Select Dr. James Carter as the new primary provider.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A dropdown menu, selection modal, or form field for assigning the primary provider is interacted with, and 'Dr. James Carter' is selected or highlighted.

task_completion.description: Save the changes and verify the new provider assignment.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The patient record for Timothy Fey explicitly displays 'Dr. James Carter' as the assigned primary provider, or a UI success message confirms the provider update.

integrity.description: The agent interacted exclusively with the NOSH web interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: All actions take place within a web browser showing the NOSH ChartingSystem. No terminal windows or database clients are used to execute SQL commands directly.

integrity.description: The agent did not fake the result in a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screen shows a genuine web browser rendering the EMR interface, not a text editor with typed-out success messages.

integrity.description: The provider was selected from the application's actual UI components.
integrity.visual_evidence: The selection of 'Dr. James Carter' occurs via standard web UI elements (dropdowns, lists) provided by the NOSH system, rather than editing HTML via browser developer tools.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Patient Name: Timothy Fey. Target Provider: Dr. James Carter. Old/Initial Provider: Dr. Sarah Admin. The task requires changing the primary provider assignment for Timothy Fey from Dr. Sarah Admin to Dr. James Carter using the NOSH ChartingSystem web interface.
